sn45.39:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, I will teach you the holy life and the fruits of the holy life. Listen to that …
sn45.39:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is the holy life? It is this Noble Eightfold Path; that is, right view … right concentration. This is called the holy life.
sn45.39:1.3: "And what, bhikkhus, are the fruits of the holy life? The fruit of stream-entry, the fruit of once-returning, the fruit of nonreturning, the fruit of arahantship. These are called the fruits of the holy life."
